name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently — no worries at all, life gets busy and dental care shouldn't feel like one more thing to stress about.

If you ever want to come back for a painless cleaning or a free new-patient consultation, here's 20% off as a small thank-you for giving us a try:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days at checkout.

And if something about your visit (or the booking, or the billing) didn't sit right, I'd really like to hear about it — just hit reply. We read every message, and we use them to make the practice gentler for the next person.

Take care of yourself,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a gentle heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure. :)

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
